name: Taiqing - Daoist Beastling Fox Priest
description:
"Hey, hey! I am a professional at this, just watch!"

Taiqing is a foxling and one of the original animals from an old tale. I got the image from here.

I am not gone entirely for what it's worth. Just passively active here and there. All feedback and criticism is welcomed.
